fields.label: Delivery Optimization settings

column.name: DeliveryOptimizationSettings
column.description: Delivery Optimization policy settings as a JSON object: all configured values under the PolicyManager DeliveryOptimization key. Values are strings.

fields.label: Delivery Optimization config

column.name: DeliveryOptimizationConfig
column.description: Effective Delivery Optimization configuration (Get-DOConfig) as a JSON object of name/value pairs.

fields.label: Delivery Optimization perf stats

column.name: DeliveryOptimizationPerfStats
column.description: Delivery Optimization performance snapshot (Get-DeliveryOptimizationPerfSnap) as a JSON object: bytes from HTTP/peers/cache server, etc.

fields.label: Delivery Optimization monthly perf stats

column.name: DeliveryOptimizationMonthlyPerfStats
column.description: Delivery Optimization month-to-date performance snapshot (Get-DeliveryOptimizationPerfSnapThisMonth) as a JSON object.

fields.label: Delivery Optimization content stats
fields.collector: Get-DeliveryOptimizationStatus -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object FileId, Status, SourceURL, DownloadMode, CacheHost, NumPeers, ExpireOn, Priority, DownloadDuration, PredefinedCallerApplication

column.name: DeliveryOptimizationContentStats
column.description: Delivery Optimization per-file download status (Get-DeliveryOptimizationStatus) as a JSON array. Use it as a row source to get one row per cached file.

column.name: CallerApplication
column.description: Caller application that requested the content (Get-DeliveryOptimizationStatus.PredefinedCallerApplication).
